mechanisms.name: loose brick
mechanisms.desc: A loose brick with a hidden text, needs to be exposed with UV light.
mechanisms.print: You manage to uncover the hidden text. The text is "82114".

mechanisms.name: wood shelf
mechanisms.desc: A flammable wood shelf. You can use a lighter to burn it.
mechanisms.print: You manage to burn it down. It unlocks a teleport portal.

mechanisms.name: hidden scratch
mechanisms.desc:
Some code seems to be hidden behind the scratch. 
You need something with magic to unlock it.
mechanisms.print:
water > X 
 X > metal 
 metal > wood 
 wood > earth 
 earth > Y 
 Password = XY

mechanisms.name: taped package
mechanisms.desc: A parcel aggressively wrapped in layers of industrial tape
mechanisms.print:
It reveals the magic formula to combine hearts to strengthen self. 
Qing: done 
Huz: ready 
Bhu: tomorrow 
Xuan: needs to think

mechanisms.name: turtle statue
mechanisms.desc: A huge black turtle statue with water flowing from its mouth

mechanisms.name: phoenix statue
mechanisms.desc: A huge phoenix statue with shining lights

mechanisms.name: tiger statue
mechanisms.desc: A huge tiger statue made of several types of metal

mechanisms.name: dragon statue
mechanisms.desc: A huge dragon statue made of wood

mechanisms.name: magic door
mechanisms.desc: A door that has unknown origin
mechanisms.print: In the realm behind the door, the divine beasts are recuperating.
